title: Positive Gems
description: A Mod about positive gems,These gems can give lots of effects
body:
这个模组添加了一些种宝石(右键使用)

举例:

视野之石:扣除1级经验来给予玩家时长1440秒的夜视

幸运馈赠:扣除5级经验来给予玩家一份礼物

洪荒之力:扣除2级经验来给予玩家不同等级和时长的力量

凤凰之祝:扣除1级经验来给予玩家时长1440秒的抗火

遨游之助:扣除1级经验来给予玩家时长1440秒的水下呼吸

未来会添加更多宝石到这个模组里

反馈 modbugreport@foxmail.com

This mod added some gems(right click to them)

For Example↓

Gem Of Sight:Reduct 1 level of experience for giving Night Vision to player for 1440 seconds.

Gem Of Lucky:Reduct 5 levels of experience for giving gifts to player.

Gem Of Strength:Reduct 2 levels of experience for giving Strength with different levels and time to player.

Gem Of Fire Resistance:Reduct 1 levels of experience for giving Fire Resistance to player for 1440 seconds.

Gem Of Water Breathing:Reduct 1 levels of experience for giving Water Breathing to player for 1440 seconds.

In the future,there will be more gems are added to this mod

Bug report to modbugreport@foxmail.com
